svg.title: HTTP streaming modes used by LLMs
svg.text: How streaming actually works over HTTP
Two flavours — same idea, different technical mechanism
① Normal HTTP request — wait for the full answer before sending anything
200 OK · full JSON body · all at once
② Server-Sent Events (SSE) — what Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini all use
200 OK · Content-Type: text/event-stream · connection stays open
③ The single HTTP header that makes it all work
This header tells the browser: "don't wait for the response to finish — render each chunk as it arrives"
④ Why SSE and not WebSocket?
